title: Fix recurring 1 FPS console performance regression
description: Investigate and fix recurring console slowdown (~1 FPS) observed during local/cloud usage. Root signal: snapshot-broadcast durations around 3s in console.log from dev server watcher path, likely causing repeated expensive snapshot rebuilds and UI churn. DoD: remove redundant snapshot churn, coalesce refresh work, verify board interaction remains smooth and realtime updates still function.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Confirmed hotspot in dev console watcher path; snapshot-broadcast takes ~3.2s and is triggered from fs-change churn.
Evidence: console.log shows repeated snapshot-broadcast durationMs≈3268 with ~1179 overlay issue files.
Next: patch watcher to coalesce refresh work and avoid unnecessary full snapshot runs; reduce frontend dependence on snapshot SSE stream.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Implemented snapshot churn reduction in dev server and disabled redundant snapshot SSE subscription in app init path.
Evidence: apps/console/server/index.ts now coalesces in-flight refresh and skips expensive refresh when snapshot SSE clients=0; apps/console/src/App.tsx now relies on realtime notifications path for live updates.
Next: validate typecheck/build and then run smoke to confirm no recurring snapshot-broadcast storms.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Performance patch committed and pushed after rebasing onto latest dev; CI triggered.
Evidence: commit 897710c; local apps/console typecheck passes.
Next: monitor CI and validate runtime logs show reduced snapshot churn (no recurring snapshot-broadcast storms) during active use.
Risk/Blocker: remote branch has concurrent changes from other sessions that may introduce unrelated CI failures.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Rolled back the performance patch at user request (misdirected task).
Evidence: revert commit cabe674 on dev reverts prior perf commit 897710c.
Next: no further changes on this issue unless re-requested.
Risk/Blocker: none.
